agents.notes: Common AGENTS.md plus open Agent Skills entry adapter.

codex.notes: Codex reads AGENTS.md and scans .agents/skills for Agent Skills.

claude.notes: Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md and project .claude/skills. Adapter name is unique to avoid duplicates in tools that also scan .claude/skills.

opencode.notes: OpenCode can discover .agents/skills; PSP avoids also installing .opencode/skills to prevent duplicate skill names. Command is a convenience adapter.

hermes.notes: Hermes Agent uses AGENTS.md as project context.

install_modes.all: Default. Install canonical PSP plus adapters for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes Agent, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and generic Agent Skills hosts.
install_modes.auto: Install canonical PSP plus adapters detected from existing project files.
install_modes.minimal: Install canonical PSP plus AGENTS/.agents entry only.
install_modes.none: Install canonical PSP only; do not create host adapter files.

duplicate_name_policy: Generic entry uses .agents/skills/using-pragmatic-skills; Claude-specific entry uses .claude/skills/psp-claude-entry.
